title: Corazon Reveals His Secret
description: Pages 1–5 focus on corazon reveals his secret, keeping the Dressrosa conflict and character roles clear for display.
scene: This part follows Donquixote Family, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5 as rosinante reveals his true nature and chooses to save Law from Doflamingo, even as the Donquixote Family closes in.

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: That's a family of tenryubito, isn't it!?

dialogue.speaker: Marines
dialogue.text: Former Tennyubito! Even if you kill 'em, the Marines ain't gonna do anything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: THANK THE HEAVENS! WE'VE BEEN GIVEN A CHANCE AT REVENGE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I thought I'd spend the rest of this life crying myself to sleep!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Let's break every bone in their bodies with hammers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Don't kill 'em!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Nah, I say we impale 'em with thousands of arrows!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Keep them alive! Make them suffer!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Long-held (grudges call forth maddening rage....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: My sons... they were just 2 and 5!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: For the crime of crossing in front of a tenryu- Bito...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: They were shot! 16 times! They died on the spot!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: My enslaved daughter came home in a wretched state...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: without a word to anyone, three days later...she took her own life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I was once a slave!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: They took both my eyes for sport!

dialogue.speaker: Baby 5
dialogue.text: My wife was burnt alive!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: I could not care less what happens to any of you!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: because of the "heavenly tax" we pay to you,

dialogue.speaker: Dressrosa Citizens
dialogue.text: The country's dying of Starva- lion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: Have you ever even felt hunger?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #18
dialogue.text: People are dying, reduced to mere skin and bones!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #19
dialogue.text: You are gods, aren't you? Not human, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #20
dialogue.text: Then some- thing like this...ain't gonna kill you, is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #21
dialogue.text: Gya AAAA AH!!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Doffy!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #22
dialogue.text: *Ani-L SAMA!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: Fucking treating humans worse than maggots...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #24
dialogue.text: Pain! Misery! Suffering! Do you bastards even know these words!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #25
dialogue.text: I'm asking you, tenryuu- Bito!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: RING RING

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #27
dialogue.text: HAA-

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #26
dialogue.text: Ring Ring

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #29
dialogue.text: Gacha

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #30
dialogue.text: What is it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #31
dialogue.text: 33 years ago, Holy Land Mariejois

dialogue.speaker: Sai
dialogue.text: Have you taken leave of your senses, Saint Holming!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #32
dialogue.text: This is unbeliev- able!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #33
dialogue.text: You intend to leave the land of the gods and degrade your- self to mere humanity?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #34
dialogue.text: But I am human.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #35
dialogue.text: I have always been.

dialogue.speaker: Doflamingo
dialogue.text: World Noble (tenryubito), Saint Donquixote Holming

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #36
dialogue.text: Are you trying to say that we are the same as well!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #37
dialogue.text: Blasphemy! What do you take us ten-ryubito for!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #38
dialogue.text: You bloody traitor!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #39
dialogue.text: You must have always been a heretic!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #40
dialogue.text: This is as far as we can take you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #41
dialogue.text: This is North End, a World Government Non-Member Nation.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #42
dialogue.text: You shall find a suitably comfortable residence and a sizable fortune over there.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #43
dialogue.text: Thank you. That is more than enough.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #44
dialogue.text: Now then, we shall be taking your tenryubito identification chip.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #45
dialogue.text: The four of us will lead a quiet life here!

dialogue.speaker: Kyros
dialogue.text: father, where're the slaves!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #46
dialogue.text: Let's go buy some!

dialogue.speaker: Donquixote Family
dialogue.text: Doffy, Rocinate... looks like we're going to have to start teaching you about everything from square one.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #47
dialogue.text: OII!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #48
dialogue.text: Why don't you bow!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #49
dialogue.text: How dis- respectful of you fools! You just passed in front of me, didn't you!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #50
dialogue.text: Some- one, hand over your pistol!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #51
dialogue.text: Just who do you think I am!?

summary: Corazon Reveals His Secret advances the Dressrosa story through Donquixote Family, Marines, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, with unclear voices kept readable rather than forced into unsafe speaker assignments.
